mapper.select: SELECT h.tag_name FROM User_Hashtag uh JOIN Hashtag h ON uh.hashtag_id = h.id WHERE uh.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Board_Like WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM Board_Like WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.user_id AS userId, u.nickname, b.title, b.content, b.start_date AS startDate, b.end_date AS endDate, b.hit, b.like_count AS likeCount, b.region, b.created_at AS createdAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Board_Like WHERE board_id = b.id AND user_id = #{userId}) > 0 AS isLiked FROM Boards b JOIN Users u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Boards (user_id, plan_id, title, content, start_date, end_date, hit, created_at, like_count, region) VALUES (#{userId}, #{planId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, 0, NOW(), 0, #{region})
mapper.select: SELECT h.tag_name FROM board_hashtag bh JOIN Hashtag h ON bh.hashtag_id = h.id WHERE bh.board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.update: UPDATE Boards SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, region = #{region}, plan_id = #{planId} WHERE id = #{id}
